title: Comments
description: Comment system settings for collaborative notebooks.

enabled.title: Enable Comments
enabled.description: Enable or disable the comment system for collaborative notebooks

notifications.title: Notification Level
notifications.description: When to show notifications for comments

mentionHighlighting.title: Highlight Mentions
mentionHighlighting.description: Highlight text when mentioned in a comment

allowAnonymous.title: Allow Anonymous Comments
allowAnonymous.description: Allow users to post comments anonymously

richText.title: Rich Text Comments
richText.description: Enable rich text formatting in comments
